classification_definitions.VERIFIED: Retained generation evidence matches the material active request shape and validates the stated bounded behavior.
classification_definitions.PARTIAL: Some request or runtime components match, but a material source-path, merge, retry, direction, or end-to-end boundary is absent.
classification_definitions.NOT_TESTED: No retained generation traverses the relevant active behavior.
classification_definitions.INVALID: The retained or configured evidence answers a different contract and cannot support the requested conclusion.

decision.summary: Long plain-text full-context plus current-chunk requests are the closest verified fit, but no evidence set admits the complete active pipeline end to end.
decision.primary_missing_contract: active block-mode full context plus current blocks, retry/fallback, persistence, and merge
decision.translation_direction: requested Russian-to-English is unsupported because the inspected active templates implement English-to-Russian

active_contract_facts: Microphone uses a dedicated coordinator; audio and video use the shared queue tail.
Microphone has a distinct text pipeline; non-microphone sources normalize to the media pipeline.
Text mode sends full_text as reference context and requests output for one separately supplied current chunk.
Chunk 1 is awaited before remaining chunks are launched under bounded concurrency.
LM Studio compatibility payloads set a prompt-cache hint and disable thinking.
Block mode sends compact id/text items with native schema, validates expected IDs, retries one invalid parse, and then falls back to original blocks.
Text merge preserves chunk order; block merge sorts updates by ID and persists per-block updates.
Transport retry covers bounded timeout, rate-limit, and server failures separately from block parse retry.
Inspected active translation templates implement English-to-Russian, not Russian-to-English.

coverage.fact: No retained call traverses microphone capture, dedicated coordinator/model ensure, source-specific prompt selection, and final application outcome.
evidence: private source code class: dedicated microphone coordinator

coverage.fact: Five cold repeats per model used one frozen long plain early chunk with full context and current-chunk isolation.
coverage.missing: Dedicated microphone path, later parallel chunks, retry, persistence, and merge.

coverage.fact: No retained real-video early/middle/late extraction-to-merge run exists.
coverage.missing: Media queue ownership, extraction, source-specific configuration, generated chunks, and final merge.

coverage.fact: All four models completed five cold full-context plus current-chunk plain requests.
coverage.non_claim: This does not admit whole-record or source-owner behavior.

coverage.fact: Controlled timestamped calls exist, but timestamped full context is not the active plain or block request representation.
coverage.risk: 29.6 percent mean token overhead and the only observed boundary/length failure.

coverage.fact: Native structured and compact-schema P2/P4 evidence proves component JSON, schema, and ID capability.
coverage.missing: One active full-context block request sequence including parse retry/fallback, persistence, and merge.

coverage.fact: No retained translation generation exists and the inspected active templates specify English-to-Russian.
coverage.reason: Opposite-direction templates cannot validate the requested direction.

coverage.fact: Active code awaits the first chunk and optionally delays before launching the remainder; loaded follow-ups were faster in retained experiments.
coverage.missing: A source-path sequence binding events, delay, identical stable prefix, later requests, and direct cache telemetry.

coverage.fact: True P2 overlap was measured and compact generic-schema P4 passed 80 of 80 requests.
coverage.missing: Complete active long-transcript request, source-specific path, retry/fallback, persistence, and merge under P2/P4.
coverage.operational_boundary: P2 is conservative; P4 is conditional on compact grammar and strict post-validation.

coverage.fact: Active merge algorithms exist, but no retained generated run validates complete early/middle/late ordering, overlap effects or block persistence and semantic completeness.

request_shape_fit.active_behavior: stable full transcript plus authoritative current chunk
request_shape_fit.evidence: long plain and controlled representation calls
request_shape_fit.fit: strong for one early plain cell; incomplete across chunks and source paths

request_shape_fit.active_behavior: block items with exact IDs and native schema
first synchronous request then concurrent remainder

request_shape_fit.evidence: product-shaped compatibility requests and loaded timing

request_shape_fit.active_behavior: transport retry plus block parse retry and original fallback
ordered text merge or ID-sorted block merge with persistence
request_shape_fit.evidence: no complete generated multi-chunk application run

minimal_remaining_calls.purpose: Close active serialization, chunk 1 warmup, P2 remainder, boundary validation, ordered merge, and cleanup on one frozen long source.

minimal_remaining_calls.condition: Only if one active arm returns invalid parse/schema output.
minimal_remaining_calls.purpose: Close compact block requests, exact IDs, active parse retry/fallback, persistence projection, and final merge.
Validate the dedicated microphone owner path and source-specific prompt.
Validate media extraction, source configuration, queue path, chunks, and merge.

minimal_remaining_calls.prerequisite: Create or select a reviewed Russian-to-English active template first.
minimal_remaining_calls.purpose: Avoid invalid calls against the opposite-direction template.

facts: Five cold long/plain calls per model completed on one frozen early chunk.
The controlled representation set retains 27 E4B, 12B QAT, and 26B MoE calls and lacks 27 other planned rows.
Compact generic-schema P4 passed 80 of 80 measured requests.
No retained microphone-audio, real-video, translation, or complete merge generation belongs to this evidence set.
The active LM Studio payload includes a prompt-cache hint and thinking-disabled setting.
interpretations: Long plain text is the closest verified request-shape match but is not full application admission.
JSON and concurrency capabilities are necessary components, not proof of the combined block pipeline.
Loaded-session timing improvement does not prove physical cache reuse.
hypotheses: 12B QAT is the strongest next application-shaped plain/block rehearsal candidate.
A three-call P2 rehearsal may close warmup and merge evidence without a larger benchmark if all boundaries are captured fail-closed.
owner_only_evidence_classes: active source-aware configuration and request-construction code
active text and block chunk planning, warmup, concurrency, retry/fallback, persistence, and merge code
active LM Studio compatibility payload construction
retained long/plain, representation, native structured, and parallel response artifacts described by public reports
unresolved_evidence_gaps: No dedicated microphone owner-path generation artifact.
No complete active block-mode request with full context, exact IDs, retry/fallback, persistence, and merge.
No Russian-to-English active template or generation result.
No complete generated early/middle/late merge with semantic review.
